title: MapStruct unmappedTargetPolicy ERROR fails compile on field mismatch
content: Set unmappedTargetPolicy=ERROR so a renamed/added field fails the build instead of silently mapping null.

title: Use Mapping target for renamed DTO fields
content: Annotate @Mapping(target=...) when the DTO field name differs from the entity field.

title: Order aggregate validates invariants before persist
content: All order mutations go through OrderService which enforces total>=0 and non-empty lines before save.

title: Flyway CREATE INDEX must be CONCURRENTLY on hot tables
content: A plain CREATE INDEX locks writes; use CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY for production tables.

title: Expand contract migration for NOT NULL columns
content: Add nullable column, backfill, then add NOT NULL in a later migration to avoid a table rewrite lock.

title: Backfill runs in its own separate migration step
content: Data backfill is a dedicated migration after the schema change so it can be re-run and reviewed independently.

title: Offload blocking calls with subscribeOn boundedElastic
content: Wrap blocking JDBC in Mono.fromCallable(...).subscribeOn(Schedulers.boundedElastic()) inside a WebFlux handler.

title: JPA ORDER BY with OFFSET degrades on large tables
content: Keyset pagination beats OFFSET for deep pages on big tables.

title: Kafka consumer manual ack with dedup
content: Use MANUAL ack mode and an idempotency check keyed on the event id.

title: Redis cache TTL and null-caching guard
content: Set a TTL and avoid caching nulls to prevent unbounded growth and cache penetration.

title: Jackson polymorphic typing needs JsonTypeInfo
content: Annotate the base type with @JsonTypeInfo to round-trip subtypes.

title: Testcontainers Postgres base IT class
content: Share a singleton PostgreSQLContainer across integration tests for speed.

title: Lombok Builder drops default field values
content: @Builder ignores field initializers unless @Builder.Default is added.
